# Mauritania Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Mauritania's administrative hierarchy:
> 15 wilayas, 63 moughataas, 238 communes.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total wilayas: 15
- Total moughataas: 63
- Total communes: 238
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All wilayas (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-wilaya.json)
- [All moughataas (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-moughataa.json)
- [All communes (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-commune.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Wilaya

- [Adrar](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/adrar-mr07/) — 4 moughataas, 11 communes
- [Assaba](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/assaba-mr03/) — 5 moughataas, 26 communes
- [Brakna](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/brakna-mr05/) — 6 moughataas, 24 communes
- [Dakhlet Nouadhibou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/dakhlet-nouadhibou-mr08/) — 2 moughataas, 6 communes
- [Gorgol](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gorgol-mr04/) — 5 moughataas, 31 communes
- [Guidimagha](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/guidimagha-mr10/) — 4 moughataas, 22 communes
- [Hodh Chargui](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/hodh-chargui-mr01/) — 8 moughataas, 37 communes
- [Hodh El Gharbi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/hodh-el-gharbi-mr02/) — 5 moughataas, 29 communes
- [Inchiri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/inchiri-mr12/) — 2 moughataas, 3 communes
- [Nouakchott Nord](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nouakchott-nord-mr14/) — 3 moughataas, 3 communes
- [Nouakchott Ouest](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nouakchott-ouest-mr13/) — 3 moughataas, 3 communes
- [Nouakchott Sud](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nouakchott-sud-mr15/) — 3 moughataas, 3 communes
- [Tagant](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tagant-mr09/) — 3 moughataas, 10 communes
- [Tiris Zemmour](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tiris-zemmour-mr11/) — 3 moughataas, 3 communes
- [Trarza](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/trarza-mr06/) — 7 moughataas, 27 communes

## Per-Wilaya Full Data

- [Adrar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/adrar-mr07.txt)
- [Assaba](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/assaba-mr03.txt)

- [Guidimagha](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/guidimagha-mr10.txt)
- [Hodh Chargui](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/hodh-chargui-mr01.txt)
- [Hodh El Gharbi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/hodh-el-gharbi-mr02.txt)
- [Inchiri](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/inchiri-mr12.txt)
- [Nouakchott Nord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nouakchott-nord-mr14.txt)
- [Nouakchott Ouest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nouakchott-ouest-mr13.txt)
- [Nouakchott Sud](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nouakchott-sud-mr15.txt)
- [Tagant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tagant-mr09.txt)
- [Tiris Zemmour](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tiris-zemmour-mr11.txt)
- [Trarza](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/trarza-mr06.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (wilaya), 2 (moughataa), 3 (commune)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Mauritania Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/mauritania-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
